sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a locust, winged and edible ( Lev 11:22), said to be so called because it covers the ground, Num 13:33 Isa 40:22 Ecc 12:5. [“Another etymology is proposed by Credner, on Joel page 309. The Samar. in Lev. loc. cit. has חרגבה which may signify a leaper, compare Arab. حرجل; and from חרגב then might come the triliteral חָגָב; comp. حرجل, חָגַל.”]

(2) [Hagab], pr.n. m., Ezr 2:46.
